name: Gmail
description: Gmail integration via Google API — comprehensive email management with OAuth2 authentication, send/receive, labels, search, and attachments.

modes.label: Own OAuth Credentials
modes.description: Use your own Google Cloud OAuth client ID and secret

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: From Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.label: Refresh Token
fields.description: OAuth2 refresh token obtained from the Google OAuth flow

modes.label: Service Account Key
modes.textDescription: Paste the contents of your Google service account JSON key file. The service account must have domain-wide delegation enabled and Gmail API access.
